summary: High‑end, punchy front‑of‑house (FOB) recording that sounds great, though the show itself isn’t described in the reviews.
review: Both reviewers praise this FOB source for its clarity, balanced vocal mics and added high‑frequency sparkle, saying it even outperforms other 1981 tapes. No specific comments about the musical performance or setlist are provided, so the analysis focuses on the recording quality alone.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave high marks (4‑5 stars) and highlighted excellent audio qualities; lack of performance details keeps the rating modestly below the maximum.

recording_quality.technical_notes: FOB mix is punchier with more high‑end, vocal mics are well‑balanced and not overly hot; reviewers note better pitch and body than other sources and suggest a matrix would be ideal.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details were mentioned in the reviews.
